# Project Euler Cross-Language Benchmarks

**1,800 solutions across 9 programming languages, all generated by Claude.**

200 Project Euler problems solved in C, C++, Rust, Go, Java, C#, JavaScript, Python, and ARM64 Assembly — every solution written by [Claude](https://claude.ai) (Opus 4.6 for algorithm design, Sonnet 4.6 for language ports). Benchmarked on Apple Silicon.

![Total Benchmark Time](charts/final_total_time.png)

## Rankings

| Rank | Language | Total Time | vs C | Avg SLOC | Wins |
|------|----------|-----------|------|----------|------|
| 1 | **Go** | 17.03s | 0.70x | 61 | 24 |
| 2 | **C++** | 24.12s | 1.00x | 48 | 40 |
| 3 | **C** | 24.20s | 1.00x | 72 | 51 |
| 4 | **Java** | 28.58s | 1.18x | 49 | 14 |
| 5 | **ARM64 Asm** | 29.15s | 1.20x | 70 | 14 |
| 6 | **C#** | 29.64s | 1.22x | 50 | 9 |
| 7 | **Rust** | 34.95s | 1.44x | 53 | 36 |
| 8 | **JavaScript** | 64.10s | 2.65x | 42 | 5 |
| 9 | **Python** | 103.13s | 4.26x | 39 | 0 |

*190 common problems, excluding 7 parked (algorithm redesign needed)*

**See [RESULTS.md](RESULTS.md) for all charts and detailed findings.**

## Key Takeaways

- **Algorithm choice matters 1000x more than language choice.** The biggest performance gaps come from algorithmic differences, not language speed.
- **C++ is the sweet spot** for Claude-generated computational code — C-speed with 35% less code thanks to STL.
- **Go is the most consistent** — tight variance, zero outlier problems, best balance of speed and reliability.
- **Rust has a fat tail** — median is C-speed (1.05x) but p90 balloons to 6.44x due to borrow checker workarounds.

## The Full Story

**[JOURNEY.md](JOURNEY.md)** has the complete narrative — how this started as a curiosity about AI code quality, evolved through 11 language attempts (2 abandoned), and what we learned about LLM-generated code along the way. Includes the two-model strategy, compiler comparisons, algorithm deep-dives, and token economics.

## Language Repositories

Each language has its own repo with solutions, benchmark harness, and results:

| Language | Repository | Compiler / Runtime |
|----------|------------|-------------------|
| C | [ProjectEuler.C](https://github.com/august-hill/ProjectEuler.C) | Apple Clang (LLVM) |
| C++ | [ProjectEuler.CPlusPlus](https://github.com/august-hill/ProjectEuler.CPlusPlus) | Apple Clang (LLVM) |
| Rust | [ProjectEuler.Rust](https://github.com/august-hill/ProjectEuler.Rust) | rustc (LLVM) |
| Go | [ProjectEuler.Go](https://github.com/august-hill/ProjectEuler.Go) | gc |
| Java | [ProjectEuler.Java](https://github.com/august-hill/ProjectEuler.Java) | OpenJDK HotSpot |
| C# | [ProjectEuler.CSharp](https://github.com/august-hill/ProjectEuler.CSharp) | .NET RyuJIT |
| JavaScript | [ProjectEuler.JavaScript](https://github.com/august-hill/ProjectEuler.JavaScript) | Node.js (V8) |
| Python | [ProjectEuler.Python](https://github.com/august-hill/ProjectEuler.Python) | CPython 3.11 |
| ARM64 Assembly | [ProjectEuler.ARM64](https://github.com/august-hill/ProjectEuler.ARM64) | Apple Clang (as) |

## Repo Structure

```
RESULTS.md            # Rankings, charts, and key findings
JOURNEY.md            # The full story behind this project
final_analysis.py     # Generates RESULTS.md and all charts
charts/               # 6 publication-quality PNG charts
data/                 # Per-language benchmark JSON files
scripts/collect.sh    # Collects results from language repos
cmd/euler-bench/      # Unified Go benchmark harness
```

## Running

```bash
# Collect benchmark results from all language repos
./scripts/collect.sh

# Generate charts and RESULTS.md
python3 final_analysis.py
```

## About

All solutions were generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/claude-code) on Apple Silicon (ARM64, macOS). Algorithm design and the first language implementation used Claude Opus 4.6; ports to remaining languages used Claude Sonnet 4.6. Human role was architectural guidance, problem selection, and benchmark infrastructure design.
